const blobURLe = dataURItoBlobURL(urll); urll=""; let db =0; function rewriteURL(original) { if (db == 0 && original.includes("doingso")){ db=1; return blobURLe;} var trimmed = original.split("/").pop().split("?")[0]; console.log(trimmed) return blobUrlss[trimmed] || original; } window.open = function () { return null; }; document.open(); document.write("\r\n\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n
